Idea Name: AI-Based Urban Traffic Prediction & Smart Routing System
Expected benefits:
Reduced citywide congestion and improved commute times

Faster emergency response through optimized routing

Enhanced urban planning using long-term traffic trend analytics

Fuel savings & emission reduction
Idea Description:
This project aims to build an AI-driven traffic prediction and management system that analyzes real-time traffic inputs, GPS data, road sensors, CCTV feeds, and historical congestion patterns. The system forecasts traffic density, detects anomalies (accidents, roadblocks), and recommends optimized routes. It integrates data from smart signals, vehicle tracking systems, and weather APIs to support city planners, emergency responders, and commuters.

The solution will use machine learning models for short-term & long-term congestion forecasting, computer vision models for vehicle counting, and reinforcement learning for automated traffic signal optimization.
potentail Challenges:
Integrating heterogeneous data streams from GPS, CCTV, and IoT devices in real-time

Ensuring prediction accuracy during sudden events (accidents, protests, weather changes)

Handling high-volume video analytics with low latency

Data privacy & secure transmission for vehicle movement logs
